LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT ITS CLAIMS AND A CLAIM THAT SUPPORT A PRAYER FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shannon Williams (714-481-0220) of Miles Baure Bergstrom & Winters for Bank of America, defendant and moving party appearing via CourtCall / Paul Page (415-314-4913) plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Discussion, Defendant submits on the tentative - The tentative ruling is adopted as ollows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to allege formation and terms of binding contract between parties. Plaintiff's performance and defendants' specific breach of contract. Prevailing party prepare order and submit within 30 days. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Paul Page (314.4913) plaintiff and responding party appearing via court call in propria persona; Tami Crosby of Miles Bauer Bergstrom & Winters, LLP (714.481.9100 x244) appearing via court call for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts sufficient to support its claims and a claim that support a prayer for declaratory relief. Plaintiff must file a 1st amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Ms. Crosby to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To Apr-27-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

All parties to provide courtesy copies of its papers to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
